CREATE TABLE pl_module (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), procedure_definition VARCHAR(2000));
INSERT INTO pl_module (id, name, procedure_definition) VALUES (1, 'module_a', 'SELECT result FROM table_a WHERE condition = true;');
INSERT INTO pl_module (id, name, procedure_definition) VALUES (2, 'module_b', 'SELECT result FROM table_b WHERE condition = false;');
INSERT INTO pl_module (id, name, procedure_definition) VALUES (3, 'module_c', 'SELECT result FROM table_c WHERE condition IS NULL;');
CREATE TABLE soap_results (id INT PRIMARY KEY, sdl_document VARCHAR(4000));
INSERT INTO soap_results (id, sdl_document) VALUES (1, 'SDL for module_a');
INSERT INTO soap_results (id, sdl_document) VALUES (2, 'SDL for module_b');
INSERT INTO soap_results (id, sdl_document) VALUES (3, 'SDL for module_c');
SELECT soap_sdl() FROM pl_module WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM pl_module WHERE name LIKE 'module_%');
SELECT soap_sdl() FROM pl_module WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM pl_module WHERE name = 'module_a');
SELECT soap_sdl() FROM pl_module WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM soap_results WHERE id = pl_module.id LIMIT 1);
SELECT soap_sdl() AS sdl FROM (SELECT * FROM pl_module WHERE id < 5) AS subquery WHERE name LIKE '%module%';
SELECT sdl_document FROM soap_results WHERE sdl_document IN (SELECT soap_sdl() FROM pl_module);
